name: Metalsource Mining Inc.
description: Metalsource Mining Inc. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on advancing high-grade precious and base metal discoveries in the eastern United States and Africa. Its flagship Silver Hill project in Davidson County, North Carolina — historically recognized as America's first silver mine — is producing significant gold, silver, and base metal intercepts, including 48.04 g/t AuEq over 12.62 metres. The company also holds the Byrd-Pilot project in North Carolina and diversification assets in Botswana.
